SEARCH

Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen

Klasse
Beschreibung
Accessory
Represents an accessory item that can be equipped by the player.
Armor
Represents an armor item that can be equipped by the player.
ArrowPanel
A custom panel that displays an arrow image.
AttackSelectionDialog
A dialog that allows the player to select an enemy target during a battle.
BattleMenuPanel
UI panel representing the battle action menu.
BattleView
The main view for a battle scene.
Consumable
Represents a consumable item that can be used to apply an effect to an entity.
ConsumableSelectionJDialog
The ConsumableSelectionJDialog provides a popup dialog that allows the player to select a consumable item during battle.
CreateNewSavePanel
A panel used for creating a new game save.
Direction
Represents the four cardinal directions used for movement and navigation within the dungeon.
Dungeon
Represents a dungeon composed of interconnected rooms arranged in a grid.
DungeonImage
Utility class responsible for rendering a pseudo-3D first-person view of the dungeon based on the player's position and facing direction.
DungeonPanel
A Swing panel responsible for rendering the dungeon view as a scaled image inside the game window.
Effect
Represents an effect that can be applied to an entity.
EncounterSystem
Utility class that manages random encounters and turn-based battles.
EnemiesLoader
Utility class responsible for loading enemy data from a serialized file.
EnemiesViewPanel
The EnemiesViewPanel represents the battle UI container for multiple enemies.
Enemy
Represents an enemy entity in the game.
EnemyPanel
The EnemyPanel represents the visual UI component for an enemy in battle.
Entity
Base class for all entities in the game.
EquipmentPanel
The EquipmentPanel represents the equipment management UI in the pause menu.
EquipmentSelectionDialog
The EquipmentSelectionDialog is a modal popup dialog that allows the player to equip or unequip items from a specific Itemtype.
EquipmentSlot
Represents the equipment slots where items can be equipped.
Equippable
Represents an item that can be equipped by the player.
Exit
Represents an exit connecting a room to another room in a specific direction.
ExitConfirmationDialog
The ExitConfirmationDialog is a modal confirmation window used to ask the player whether they really want to exit the game or return to the main menu.
Game
Represents the complete game state.
GameController
Utility class for creating and loading Game instances.
GameFrame
Main application window of the game.
GameWindow
Main in-game UI container responsible for rendering the dungeon view, player HUD (health bar), and handling real-time player input.
Headwear
Represents a headwear item that can be equipped by the player.
HealEffect
An effect that restores health to a target entity.
HealthBar
A custom health bar component that visually represents an entity's current and maximum health.
Inventory
Represents a player's inventory that stores items and their quantities.
InventoryScreen
InventoryScreen represents the graphical user interface for displaying the player's inventory inside the pause menu.
Item
Base class for all items in the game.
ItemsLoader
Utility class responsible for loading item data from a serialized file.
Itemtype
Represents the different categories of items available in the game.
Main
Entry point of the application.
MainMenu
Main menu panel of the game.
MusicPlayer
Utility class responsible for playing and managing background music.
OptionScreen
A pause menu screen that provides game options such as saving, loading, exiting the game, and toggling fullscreen mode.
Player
Represents the player character in the game.
PlayerController
Utility class responsible for creating and initializing Player objects.
PlayerMenu
A customized JMenu with centered text rendering, custom colors, and hover-based visual feedback.
PopupDialog
A lightweight popup dialog used to display short messages to the user.
Room
Represents a room in the dungeon.
RoundedCornerBorder
A custom Swing border that draws a rounded rectangle around a component.
SavedataHandler
Utility class for saving and loading player save data.
ScrollBarUI
A custom implementation of BasicScrollBarUI that provides a styled appearance for Swing scroll bars.
SideBorder
A custom border that paints vertical white lines on one or both sides of a Swing component.
SpriteImagePanel
A panel that displays a sprite image.
StatsPanel
A panel that displays the player's statistics inside the status screen.
StatusScreen
A UI panel that represents the player's status screen.
ToggleButton
A custom toggle button that switches a JFrame between windowed and fullscreen mode.
TutorialDialog
A modal tutorial dialog that displays basic game controls and instructions to the player before starting the game.
Weapon
Represents a weapon item that can be equipped by the player.
